name: getAgentResume
description: Resumes an async subagent project with a new follow-up task. The subagent automatically has access to all prior context and results from the same project — no need to pass artifacts or URLs. Use this when the user provides a projectId and wants a follow-up, refinement, or to retrieve the last result from a previous async job.

projectId.description: The projectId returned by the previous getSubAgent(async:true) call. Identifies the project whose context should be resumed.

task.description: The new follow-up task or instruction for the subagent. The subagent will see all prior context from this project automatically.
